# Wordsmith Integrations Page Redesign

> A complete redesign of the Wordsmith AI integrations page — transforming a static list into an interactive, searchable experience with floating integration pills, live filtering, and a lead-capture empty state. Built as a portfolio piece demonstrating SaaS website redesign, landing page design, and frontend development capabilities.

## What this is

This is a self-initiated redesign of the Wordsmith AI integrations page. The original page was a static list of integrations. This redesign turns it into two experiences:

1. **A hero section** with a staggered, slightly rotated cascade of floating, clickable integration pills (Notion, Slack, SharePoint, Outlook, Juro, Teams, Zapier, Gmail, Asana, Word). Each pill lifts and scales on hover with a cubic-bezier ease.

2. **A browse section** with live search filtering, category filter chips (Communication, Productivity, Documents, Automation, Legal), and a graceful empty state that offers a "Request an integration" lead-capture form.

## Services offered

- SaaS website redesign
- Landing page design
- Product page optimization
- UI/UX redesign
- Hero section design
- Integration page design
- Frontend development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
- Interaction design
- Brand and web design

## Target audience

Companies and teams with SaaS products whose current website undersells their product. Especially legal tech, productivity tools, and platforms with integration ecosystems.

## Tech stack

- HTML5 (semantic, accessible)
- CSS3 (custom properties, grid, flexbox, responsive breakpoints)
- Vanilla JavaScript (live search, filtering, form interactions)
- No build step, no frameworks — ships as static files
